meta.note: All numeric parameters are research-backed. See market-research-corpus.md for citations.

market_conditions._tech_employment_note: 3.2% ABOVE pre-pandemic level (growth rate, not ratio). Source: CompTIA 2026 workforce report.
market_conditions._entry_level_note: 73% decline in entry-level hiring rate. Sources: Korn Ferry workforce report (Source 011); Pragmatic Engineer tech hiring analysis (Source 015). See market-research-corpus.md.
market_conditions.note: Sources: layoffs.fyi, TrueUp, Computerworld 2026; CompTIA; Pragmatic Engineer 2025; Resume-Now Survey 2025; GIA/DataArts 2025

job.note: Huntr Q2 2025 analysis of 461,000 applications; Careery.pro 2026 response timing research

grant.note: Creative Capital historical ~2-3%; NEA varies by program

residency.note: Estimated from program capacities; Headlands ~50 per year from large pool

fellowship.note: Mozilla: up to 10/cycle; Whiting: up to 10/cycle

prize.note: Prix Ars Electronica 2025: 3,987 submissions; Golden Nicas: ~4-6 per category. S+T+ARTS: 2 grand prizes

writing.note: Literary journal/op-ed acceptance rates; varies widely by prestige

emergency.note: Rauschenberg Medical Emergency Grants: ~$150K/cycle distributed; designed for high throughput

consulting.note: B2B cold outreach; warm intro multiplier applies

tier-1._multiplier_note: response_rate_multiplier (8x) = how much more likely to get a response via referral (LinkedIn Economic Graph). hiring_probability_multiplier (4-5x) = how much more likely to be hired (separate metric).
tier-1.note: Anthropic avg hiring 19 days; DevEx role 60 days. Every documented success in 2024-2025 involved referral or unconventional path.

referral.source: LinkedIn Economic Graph 2025; referred candidates 4-5x more likely to be hired; 29 day avg vs 44 for general

linkedin_easy_apply.note: Avoid as primary channel. Easy Apply: 834 avg applications vs 295 for direct. 3% receive human review.

company_career_page.source: JobPilotApp 2025 Easy Apply vs direct study

follow_up_protocol.note: Candidates who follow up get 68% more offers. 80% of hiring managers expect follow-ups but only 24% send them. Days 7-10 first DM adds 15-25% callback lift.
follow_up_protocol.source: ResumeGenius 2026; Zety follow-up guide; Indeed career advice

volume_benchmarks.note: Huntr Q2 2025 (461K applications): tailored 5.75% vs generic 2.68% interview rate. Wellfound: 78% higher response with tailored. ResumeGenius: 53% higher callback with tailored cover letter. Sweet spot 21-80 apps.
volume_benchmarks.source: Huntr Q2 2025 Job Search Trends Report; Wellfound study; ResumeGenius; ResuTrack 2026

ai_lab_tier1.note: Anthropic SWE: $550K-$759K; OpenAI SWE: $255K-$590K. Research roles lower: $315K-$560K

developer_relations.note: 2023 DevRel compensation survey median $175K TC; base salary avg $85K (PayScale 2025)
developer_relations.source: Common Room 2023 DevRel Compensation & Culture Report; PayScale 2026

technical_writer.source: Robert Half 2026 Salary Guide; Motion Recruitment 2026

creative_capital_grant.note: Up to $50K unrestricted. $2.9M to 109 artists in 2026 cycle.

lacma_art_tech.note: Up to $50K per project; 3-5 projects selected

mozilla_fellowship.note: Track I: $75K stipend + $25K project = $100K total. Track II: $100K stipend + $25K = $125K total. Up to 10 fellows.

whiting_nonfiction.note: Up to 10 writers per cycle at $40K each
whiting_nonfiction.source: Whiting Foundation website; Literary Hub 2024 announcement

starts_prize.note: Two Grand Prizes at €20K each (€40K total)

rauschenberg_award.source: Foundation for Contemporary Arts; Robert Rauschenberg Award

portal_friction_scores.note: Scale 1-10; higher = lower friction for applicant. Greenhouse/Lever/Ashby are feature-equivalent; Ashby adds advanced analytics and is cheaper for <500-person companies.
portal_friction_scores.source: SpotSaaS 2026 ATS comparison; Index.dev ATS guide 2026

skills_signals.mcp_adoption: industry-standard 2025-2026; as common as running web servers
skills_signals.note: 87% of tech recruiters review GitHub during hiring. Go: +41% job posting growth. Platform engineering = DevOps scaled into product discipline. MCP is now standard.
skills_signals.source: The New Stack 2026; La Fosse Academy 2026; HiringHello 2026; DEV Community MCP predictions 2026; CandorCo GitHub portfolio guide

prix_ars_electronica_2026.award_note: Golden Nica; small number per category

rauschenberg_medical_emergency.note: Medical/dental/mental health emergencies for visual/film/digital/choreography artists

stale_thresholds_days.note: entry_stale = no review in 7d (standup STAGNANT alert). response_overdue triggers check_outcomes.py alerts. response_ghosted_job = 3x median_response_days (14d) per Careery.pro data.

job_freshness.note: Job postings receive 80% of applications in first 48h. After 72h, conversion probability drops below cold-app baseline.

ats_analysis.ats_auto_rejection_myth: ATS rarely auto-rejects; recruiter keyword search + volume creates effective rejection via non-visibility
ats_analysis.greenhouse_lever_ashby_comparison: Feature-equivalent for core ATS; Ashby adds analytics and is cheaper <500 employees
ats_analysis.source: TheInterviewGuys ATS Rejection Myth; SpotSaaS 2026; Index.dev 2026; Equip.co 2026

urgency_thresholds.note: Lead-time windows per effort level. complex entries need 7d just to reach critical; quick entries need only 1d.

typical_response_windows.note: Arrays are [stale_days, ghosted_days]. submittable/slideroom use grant/prize median_response_days from track_benchmarks.

seed_metrics.note: 142 days median close (up from 68 in 2021). Post-money SAFEs dominate pre-seed at 88%

series_a_metrics.note: Series A median pre-money $49.3M (record). Seed-to-A 616 days; A-to-B 28 months

startup_funding_landscape.source: Crunchbase Jan 2026; CB Insights 2025; PitchBook-NVCA Q4 2025; Carta Q3 2025

sbir_sttr.note: SBIR/STTR authorization expired October 2025. $4B/year frozen. Monitor for reauthorization.

cloud_credits.note: Non-dilutive cloud credits for AI startups. Microsoft: up to $150K over 4yr. AWS: up to $300K for AI. Google: up to $350K.

qsbs_2025_update.bill: OBBBA (One Big Beautiful Bill Act, July 2025)
qsbs_2025_update.note: QSBS exclusion raised from $10M to $15M with tiered vesting. California does NOT conform.

non_dilutive_funding.source: SBIR.gov; NSF I-Corps; DARPA; ARPA-E; MacArthur/Ford Humanity AI; Microsoft/AWS/Google/NVIDIA startup programs; OBBBA July 2025

incorporation.note: Delaware C-Corp is universal standard for VC-backed. Wyoming LLC for non-VC bootstrapped.

equity_instruments.note: Post-money SAFEs dominate. YC standard terms. Priced rounds at Series A.

solo_founder_data.solo_disadvantage_vc: most VCs prefer co-founders; adjust pitch accordingly
solo_founder_data.note: Solo founders: 42% of $1M+ revenue companies, 52.3% of exits

accelerator_tier.note: YC: $125K for 7% + $375K MFN SAFE. 1.5% acceptance rate.

runway_planning.note: Start fundraising 6+ months before cash runs out. Seed rounds take 142 days median.

startup_mechanics.source: YCombinator; Carta State of Pre-Seed 2025; startup-research-march-2026.md

pitch_deck.note: VCs spend 2m24s per deck. First 3 slides = 70% of decision. 98%+ rejection rate.

networking.note: Warm intros convert 58%+. Cold 1-5%. Founders have ~200+ unrealized warm paths.

personal_brand.note: Personal profiles 5x company engagement. 87% of recruiters review GitHub (90s scan).

proof_of_work.note: Proof of work replacing credentials. 5+ reviews increase conversion 270%.

storytelling.note: Match narrative to market stage. Mismatched narratives repel rather than attract.

ai_differentiation.note: AI wrapper era collapsed. System is the moat, not the model. Vertical > horizontal.

grant_differentiation.note: Strongest grants show work serves applicant AND funder mission simultaneously.

social_proof.note: 5+ reviews = 270% conversion lift. Authenticity beats automation in 2026.

revenue_based_financing.note: RBF market projected $42B by 2027. Non-dilutive. Best for SaaS with $10K+ MRR.

equity_crowdfunding.note: Reg CF allows $5M/12 months. Increasingly treated as GTM channel, not just fundraising.

rewards_crowdfunding.note: Kickstarter all-or-nothing; Indiegogo flexible. Pre-launch community building mandatory.

crypto_web3_grants.note: Gitcoin Labs shutting down BUT Grants Program continues through ~2029. Quadratic funding model.

creative_economy.note: Patreon 10% fee (new creators). Substack 10% on paid subs. BuyMeACoffee 5%.

fractional_cto.note: Structural shift, not cyclical. Viable hedge if full-time search exceeds 3 months.

brex.note: Capital One acquiring for $5.15B; status unclear post-acquisition

mercury.note: Full-stack financial platform; venture debt + working capital

svb.note: Now First Citizens division; actively lending Feb 2026

international_programs.note: 65+ countries offer DN visas. 46 startup visa programs across 39 countries.

founder_burnout.shadow_burnout_note: 73% experience it; often undetected until crisis. Signs: decision fatigue, cynicism, micro-optimizing.

legal_landmines.delaware_franchise_tax_note: Can be $400K+ if using Authorized Shares method; use Assumed Par Value method
legal_landmines.note: FTC non-compete ban failed. 83(b) election within 30 days of stock grant is critical.

insurance.note: D&O at $125/month early is much cheaper than after incidents

disability_grants.note: Disability-specific funding is the least competitive grant category. If applicable, prioritize.

climate_impact_framing.note: ESG $62.6B PE. Climate/impact framing opens additional funding channels.

eu_ai_act_as_moat.note: EU AI Act compliance requirements create competitive moat for compliant companies

open_source_strategy.note: Open source as strategic hiring pipeline and brand building

academic_partnerships.note: STTR specifically requires academic partnership. Universities unlock additional funding.

timing_considerations.note: Grant cycles require 6-9 months lead time. Market timing matters less than execution.

documentation_as_leverage.note: Public documentation, essays, and technical writing generate inbound deal flow

first_time_founder_gap.note: First-time founders underestimate legal, financial, and HR complexity
